inputs.prompt:
A high-performance racing car speeding along a professional racetrack, captured at extreme speed.

The car hugs the asphalt tightly through sharp corners, tires gripping the track as sparks and heat distortion appear subtly near the ground.

Motion blur streaks across the background while the racing car remains sharply in focus, emphasizing velocity and precision.

Dynamic camera work with low-angle tracking shots, side panning, and brief close-ups of spinning wheels and aerodynamic details.

Modern racetrack environment with safety barriers, blurred grandstands, and dramatic lighting.

High-contrast color palette with bold reds, blacks, and metallic tones, intense and adrenaline-filled atmosphere.

Cinematic motorsport film style, hyper-realistic visuals, ultra-detailed textures, realistic reflections.

High resolution, smooth motion, professional color grading, commercial-quality video.

No text, no logos, no watermarks.
